title: Shijing: Juan Er (Curly Plant)
description: From the Shijing (Book of Songs) — the oldest collection of Chinese poetry, compiled by Confucius from songs of the Zhou dynasty.
introduction: From the Shijing (Book of Songs) — the oldest collection of Chinese poetry, compiled by Confucius from songs of the Zhou dynasty.

translation.text: I gather and gather the curly plant, but cannot fill my shallow basket. With a sigh for the man of my heart, I place it there on the highway.
